---
title: "The Rev. Henry Octavius Coxe"
---

## The Rev. Henry Octavius Coxe

**Dates:** (1811- 8 July 1881)

### Description

librarian

### Biography

Coxe became  Bodley's Librarian in 1860.  He was father of Susan Esther (Coxe) Wordsworth, the first wife of the Rt. Rev. John Wordsworth.  CMY had probably met him through her friendship with the Rev. Edwards Sewell and his sister Janetta. [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 17 th [1881]
- Letter from Novr 26th 1874
- Letter from Novr 10th 1864
- Letter from Novr 26th 1862
- Letter from Oct 29th 1862
- Letter from Oct 13th [1861]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
